description: Regular weekly groceries purchased at local supermarket near registered home address
Monthly gym membership auto-renewal charged to card on file as usual
Morning coffee and pastry at neighborhood coffee shop visited regularly on weekdays
Gas station fill-up at familiar station near home, normal volume for vehicle type
Dinner at local Italian restaurant with family on a Friday evening, tip included
Monthly streaming video subscription auto-renewal, same amount every month
Prescription pickup at local pharmacy, same medications refilled monthly
Paperback novel purchased at neighborhood bookstore on a Saturday afternoon
Monthly electric utility bill automatic payment, consistent with prior month amounts
Automated monthly mortgage payment to known lender, identical amount each month
Multiple high-value gift cards purchased across different store locations within 20 minutes, buyer declined store assistance
International wire transfer to unknown overseas account in Eastern Europe immediately following suspicious login from foreign IP address
Luxury watch purchase from unverified online vendor, shipping address differs completely from billing address, no prior relationship
High-end electronics bulk order using newly opened account with unverified identity, expedited shipping to freight forwarder
Large transfer to new payee immediately following unauthorized password reset and email change, account holder unreachable
Duplicate charge appearing at same gas station within 30 minutes, second charge submitted from skimming device after original
Customer disputed high-value electronics purchase claiming non-receipt despite confirmed delivery signature on file
New account opened with slightly altered identity details making immediate bulk fashion purchases before verification completes
Corporate vendor invoice payment redirected to attacker bank account following spoofed email impersonating CFO with new wire instructions
ATM cash withdrawal in foreign country immediately followed by domestic online purchase within same minute, physically impossible
